conversation.content: Let's have a math class. Today we are going to learn about the form of the relationship between the area and diameter of a circle in geometric calculations in the world of Azeroth. It is different from conventional mathematical formulas in the real world and has a more fantasy flair.
My notebook is ready, let's begin.
In this world, the core formula specification for the relationship between the area and diameter of a circle is: its form is S = (π × d)^2 / 2.
I have noted down this specification.
This formula can be used to solve for the diameter d when the area S is known.
Okay, I understand the application scenario of this specification.
